title: HM Land Registry identity
body: "Videos    How to avoid requisitions – confirmation of identity (2 minutes)   Webinars  Register to watch the following recordings:  Evidence of Identity (35 minutes)  Further information  Read our guidance for more information on this topic:   Completing forms ID1 and ID2 Completing the evidence of identity panels on forms AP1, FR1 and DS2 Practice Guide 67 – evidence of identity  "
